item.title: v1.82.6.dev.1
item.description: ## What's Changed * [Test] UI: Add unit tests for 10 untested components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23891 * fix: auto-recover shared aiohttp session when closed by @voidborne-d in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23808 * [Feature] /v2/team/list: Add org admin access control, members_count, and indexes by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23938 * [Refactor] UI - Playground: Extract FilePreviewCard from ChatUI by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23973 * docs: add v1.82.3 release notes by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23820 * fix(proxy): model-level guardrails not executing for non-streaming post_call by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23774 * fix(proxy): prevent duplicate callback logs for pass-through endpoint failures by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23509 * docs: Revamp documentation site with new navigation, landing pages, and styling by @Arindam200 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24023 * Fix langfuse otel traceparent propagation by @jyeros in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24048 * [Test] UI: Add unit tests for 10 untested components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24036 * [Fix] UI - Logs: Guardrail Mode Type Crash on Non-String Values by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24035 * [Staging] - Ishaan March 17th by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23903 * [Infra] Merge daily branch with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24055 * [Fix] UI - Default Team Settings: Add Missing Permission Options by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24039 * fix: /key/block and /key/unblock return 404 (not 401) for non-existent keys by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23977 * [Refactor] UI - Playground: Extract ChatMessageBubble from ChatUI by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24062 * [Fix] Key Update Endpoint Returns 401 Instead of 404 for Nonexistent Keys by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24063 * fix: surface Anthropic code execution results as code_interpreter_call in Responses API by @andrzej-pomirski-yohana in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23784 * [Feature] UI - Leftnav: Add external link icon to Learning Resources by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24069 * Fix thinking blocks dropped when thinking field is null by @xr843 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24070 * Preserve router model_group in generic API logs by @emerzon in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24044 * Fix/proxy only failure call type by @alilxxey in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24050 * fix(langsmith): populate usage_metadata in outputs for Cost column by @themavik in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24043 * Fix model repetition detection performance by @hytromo in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/18120 * fix: fix logging for response incomplete streaming + custom pricing on /v1/messages and /v1/responses by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24080 * docs: add Contributing to Guardrails section to Guardrail Providers sidebar by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24083 * chore: regenerate poetry.lock to unblock CI (pyproject.toml content hash drift) by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24082 * Ishaan - March 18th changes by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24056 * [Test] UI: Add vitest coverage for 10 untested components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24144 * chore: apply black formatting to fix lint CI by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24092 * feat(proxy): use AZURE_DEFAULT_API_VERSION for proxy --api_version default by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24120 * chore: apply black formatting to fix lint CI (batch 2) by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24153 * [Refactor] UI - API Reference: Migrate to Path-Based Routing by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24155 * chore: add poetry check --lock to lint CI to prevent stale lockfile merges by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24159 * [Infra] Merge daily internal branch with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24150 * chore: apply black formatting to proxy/_types.py to fix lint CI by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24167 * docs: add LiteLLM license key environment variable instructions by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24168 * Litellm oss staging 03 18 2026 by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24081 * chore: apply black formatting to fix lint CI (batch 3) by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24173 * docs(release-notes): complete v1.82.3 changelog with full PR audit by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24090 * feat(anthropic): support ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN and ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL env vars by @devin-petersohn in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24140 * chore: apply black formatting and enable black pre-commit hook by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24187 * fix: upgrade mcp to 1.26.0 and bump version to 1.82.5 by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24179 * [Fix] UI: AntD Messages Not Rendering by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24192 * [Feature] UI - Teams: Modernize Teams Table by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24189 * [Refactor] Extract useChatHistory hook from ChatUI.tsx by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24172 * fix(proxy): add team_member_budget_duration to NewTeamRequest by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23484 * [Feature] Team MCP Server Manager Role by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24171 * [Docs] Add missing team_member_budget_duration param to new_team docstring by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24243 * feat: add control plane for multi-proxy worker management by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24217 * Revert "[Feature] Team MCP Server Manager Role" by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24255 * fix(test): mock get_auth_header instead of get_api_key in anthropic file content test by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24258 * [Infra] Merge internal dev branch with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24260 * [Feature] MCP team management + per-member granular permissions by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24266 * [Refactor] UI - Policies: Extract usePolicyVersions Hook by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24259 * [Feature] UI - MCP: Team member permissions drawer and CRUD access by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24274 * [Feature] Search Tools: Add access control via object permissions by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24075 * [Test] UI: Add vitest coverage for 10 untested components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24239 ## New Contributors * @voidborne-d made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23808 * @andrzej-pomirski-yohana made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23784 * @xr843 made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24070 * @alilxxey made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24050 * @hytromo made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/18120 * @devin-petersohn made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24140 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/compare/v1.82.4-nightly...v1.82.6.dev.1

item.title: v1.82.6-nightly
item.description: ## What's Changed * fix(anthropic): preserve thinking.summary when routing to OpenAI Responses API by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/21441 * docs: add thinking.summary field to /v1/messages and reasoning docs by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22823 * fix(gemini): resolve image token undercounting in usage metadata by @gustipardo in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22608 * feat(anthropic): add opt-out flag for default reasoning summary by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22904 * fix(anthropic): align translate_thinking_for_model with default summary injection + docs by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22909 * fix(fireworks): skip #transform=inline for base64 data URLs by @awais786 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23729 * fix(langsmith): avoid no running event loop during sync init by @pandego in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23727 * fix(gemini): support images in tool_results for /v1/messages routing by @awais786 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23724 * fix(model-prices): correct supported_regions for Vertex AI DeepSeek models by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23864 * fix(model-prices): restore gpt-4-0314 by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23753 * fix(cache): Fix Redis cluster caching by @cohml in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23480 * fix(proxy): convert max_budget to float when set via environment variable by @rstar327 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23855 * Add Akto Guardrails to LiteLLM by @rzeta-10 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23250 * fix(core): map Anthropic 'refusal' finish reason to 'content_filter' by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23899 * fix(vertex): streaming finish_reason='stop' instead of 'tool_calls' for gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23895 * fix: map Chat Completion file type to Responses API input_file by @gambletan in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23618 * fix(vertex): respect vertex_count_tokens_location for Claude count_tokens by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23907 * fix(anthropic): preserve cache directive on file-type content blocks by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23906 * fix(mistral): preserve diarization segments in transcription response by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23925 * fix(gemini): pass model to context caching URL builder for custom api_base by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23928 * fix(azure): auto-route gpt-5.4+ tools+reasoning to Responses API by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23926 * merge main by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24119 * [Test] UI: Add vitest coverage for 10 untested components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24144 * [Refactor] UI - API Reference: Migrate to Path-Based Routing by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24155 * [Fix] UI: AntD Messages Not Rendering by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24192 * [Feature] UI - Teams: Modernize Teams Table by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24189 * [Refactor] Extract useChatHistory hook from ChatUI.tsx by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24172 * Day 0: gpt 5.4 mini and nano support by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23958 * [feat]Add prompt management support for responses api by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23999 * docs(vertex): add PayGo/Priority tutorial and cost tracking flow diagramLitellm vertex paygo tutorial by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24009 * feat(file_search): align emulated Responses behavior with native output by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23969 * fix(proxy): pass-through subpath auth for non-admin users by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24079 * fix(polling): check rate limits before creating polling ID by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24106 * docs: note min version for encrypted_content_affinity by @milan-berri in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23854 * feat(router): add per-model-group deployment affinity by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24110 * Litellm fix ensure alternating roles by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24015 * fix(bedrock): respect api_base and aws_bedrock_runtime_endpoint in count_tokens endpoint by @stias in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24199 * fix(gemini-embeddings): convert task_type to camelCase taskType for Gemini API by @christopherbaer in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24191 * fix(vertex-ai): support batch cancel via Vertex API by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23957 * fix(azure-ai-agents): preserve annotations in Bing Search grounding responses by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23939 * fix(logging): merge hidden_params into metadata for streaming requests by @milan-berri in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24220 * docs(pricing): add official source links for Azure DeepSeek & Cohere … by @Jayachander123 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/20181 * fix(transcription): fix cost_per_second calculation for audio transcription models by @gvioss in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23842 * fix(moonshot): preserve reasoning_content on Pydantic Message objects in multi-turn tool calls by @BillionClaw in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23828 * fix(proxy): add team_member_budget_duration to NewTeamRequest by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23484 * [Feature] Team MCP Server Manager Role by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24171 * [Docs] Add missing team_member_budget_duration param to new_team docstring by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24243 * feat: add control plane for multi-proxy worker management by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24217 * Revert "[Feature] Team MCP Server Manager Role" by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24255 * fix(test): mock get_auth_header instead of get_api_key in anthropic file content test by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24258 * [Infra] Merge internal dev branch with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24260 * [Feature] Add Audit Log Export to External Callbacks by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23167 * fix(adapter): add additionalProperties: false for OpenAI strict mode in Anthropic adapter by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24072 * feat(gemini): support context circulation for server-side tool combination by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24073 * feat(bedrock): support cache_control_injection_points for tool_config location by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24076 * Revert "fix(transcription): fix cost_per_second calculation for audio transcription models" by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24297 * Litellm fix create key tags dropdown by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24273 * Litellm oss staging 03 19 2026 by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24174 * docs: add Gemini/Vertex AI prompt caching support to docs by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24222 * fix: global secret redaction via root logger + key-name-based pattern matching by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24305 * polish: add click-to-copy icon on User ID in internal users table by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24315 * polish: remove required asterisks from v3 login form fields by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24318 * Litellm ishaan march 20 by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24303 * fix(fireworks): skip #transform=inline for base64 data URLs (#23729) by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23818 * fix(proxy): restore per-entity breakdown in aggregated daily activity endpoint by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23471 * Litellm oss staging 03 05 2026 by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22844 * Litellm dev sameer 16 march week by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24211 * litellm ryan march 20 by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24323 ## New Contributors * @gustipardo made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22608 * @pandego made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23727 * @cohml made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23480 * @rstar327 made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23855 * @rzeta-10 made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23250 * @stias made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24199 * @christopherbaer made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24191 * @Jayachander123 made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/20181 * @BillionClaw made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23828 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/compare/v1.82.3.dev.2...v1.82.6-nightly

item.title: v1.82.3.dev.4
item.description: ## What's Changed * fix: don't close HTTP/SDK clients on LLMClientCache eviction by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22926 * [Feature] UI - Keys: Add Organization Dropdown to Create/Edit Key by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23595 * [Test] UI - Add Unit Tests for 5 Untested Components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23607 * [Feature] UI - Internal Users: Add/Remove Team Membership by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23638 * [Feature] UI - Default Team Settings: Modernize page and fix defaults application by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23614 * [Fix] Tag list endpoint 500 from invalid Prisma group_by kwargs by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23606 * [Feature] UI - Usage: Auto-paginate daily spend data by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23622 * [Infra] Merge internal dev 3/13 with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23658 * feat: add sagemaker_nova provider for Amazon Nova models on SageMaker by @ryanh-ai in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/21542 * [Fix] Team Admin 403 on /user/filter/ui With Org Scope Flag by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23671 * fix: redact secrets from proxy log output by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23668 * fix: prisma migrate deploy failures on pre-existing instances by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23655 * [Fix] Hanging CI Tests in custom_httpx test_http_handler by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23674 * Add CodSpeed continuous performance benchmarks by @codspeed-hq[bot] in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23676 * [Infra] Merge internal dev with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23654 * Litellm fix redaction filter logging v2 by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23667 * [Fix] Bump PyJWT to ^2.12.0 for Security by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23678 * Root cause fix - item.title: v1.82.5-nightly
item.description: ## What's Changed * [Test] UI: Add unit tests for 10 untested components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23891 * fix: auto-recover shared aiohttp session item.title: v1.82.3.dev.2
item.description: ## What's Changed * [Test] UI: Add unit tests for 10 untested components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23891 * fix: auto-recover shared aiohttp session when closed by @voidborne-d in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23808 * [Feature] /v2/team/list: Add org admin access control, members_count, and indexes by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23938 * [Refactor] UI - Playground: Extract FilePreviewCard from ChatUI by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23973 * docs: add v1.82.3 release notes by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23820 * fix(proxy): model-level guardrails not executing for non-streaming post_call by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23774 * fix(proxy): prevent duplicate callback logs for pass-through endpoint failures by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23509 * docs: Revamp documentation site with new navigation, landing pages, and styling by @Arindam200 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24023 * Fix langfuse otel traceparent propagation by @jyeros in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24048 * [Test] UI: Add unit tests for 10 untested components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24036 * [Fix] UI - Logs: Guardrail Mode Type Crash on Non-String Values by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24035 * [Staging] - Ishaan March 17th by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23903 * [Infra] Merge daily branch with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24055 * [Fix] UI - Default Team Settings: Add Missing Permission Options by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24039 * fix: /key/block and /key/unblock return 404 (not 401) for non-existent keys by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23977 * [Refactor] UI - Playground: Extract ChatMessageBubble from ChatUI by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24062 * [Fix] Key Update Endpoint Returns 401 Instead of 404 for Nonexistent Keys by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24063 * fix: surface Anthropic code execution results as code_interpreter_call in Responses API by @andrzej-pomirski-yohana in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23784 * [Feature] UI - Leftnav: Add external link icon to Learning Resources by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24069 * Fix thinking blocks dropped when thinking field is null by @xr843 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24070 * Preserve router model_group in generic API logs by @emerzon in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24044 * Fix/proxy only failure call type by @alilxxey in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24050 * fix(langsmith): populate usage_metadata in outputs for Cost column by @themavik in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24043 * Fix model repetition detection performance by @hytromo in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/18120 * fix: fix logging for response incomplete streaming + custom pricing on /v1/messages and /v1/responses by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24080 * docs: add Contributing to Guardrails section to Guardrail Providers sidebar by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24083 * chore: regenerate poetry.lock to unblock CI (pyproject.toml content hash drift) by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24082 * fix(openai): handle missing 'id' field in streaming chunks for MiniMax by @chengyongru in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23931 * Ishaan - March 18th changes by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24056 * chore: apply black formatting to fix lint CI by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24092 * feat(proxy): use AZURE_DEFAULT_API_VERSION for proxy --api_version default by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24120 * chore: apply black formatting to fix lint CI (batch 2) by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24153 * chore: add poetry check --lock to lint CI to prevent stale lockfile merges by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24159 * [Infra] Merge daily internal branch with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24150 * chore: apply black formatting to proxy/_types.py to fix lint CI by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24167 * docs: add LiteLLM license key environment variable instructions by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24168 * fix(proxy): defer logging until post-call guardrails complete by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24135 * Litellm oss staging 03 18 2026 by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24081 * Add IF NOT EXISTS to index creation in migration by @superpoussin22 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24105 * fix(proxy): kill orphaned prisma engine subprocess on failed disconnect by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24149 * chore: apply black formatting to fix lint CI (batch 3) by @joereyna in websearch for github_copilot provider by @johnib in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24143 * feat(anthropic): support ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN and ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL env vars by @devin-petersohn in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24140 * chore: apply black formatting and enable black pre-commit hook by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24187 * merge main 0319 by recursion in OVHCloud get_supported_openai_params by @themavik in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/24118 * feat: add proxy-wide default api key tpm/rpm limits by @ephrimstanley in item.title: v1.82.4-nightly
item.description: ## What's Changed * [Feature] UI - Keys: Add Organization Dropdown to Create/Edit Key by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23595 * [Test] UI - Add Unit Tests for 5 Untested Components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23607 * [Feature] UI - Internal Users: Add/Remove Team Membership by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23638 * [Feature] UI - Default Team Settings: Modernize page and fix defaults application by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23614 * [Fix] Tag list endpoint 500 from invalid Prisma group_by kwargs by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23606 * [Feature] UI - Usage: Auto-paginate daily spend data by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23622 * [Infra] Merge internal dev 3/13 with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23658 * feat: add sagemaker_nova provider for Amazon Nova models on SageMaker by @ryanh-ai in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/21542 * [Fix] Team Admin 403 on /user/filter/ui With Org Scope Flag by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23671 * fix: redact secrets from proxy log output by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23668 * fix: prisma migrate deploy failures on pre-existing instances by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23655 * [Fix] Hanging CI Tests in custom_httpx test_http_handler by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23674 * Add CodSpeed continuous performance benchmarks by @codspeed-hq[bot] in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23676 * [Infra] Merge internal dev with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23654 * Litellm fix redaction filter logging v2 by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23667 * [Fix] Bump PyJWT to ^2.12.0 for Security by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23678 * Root cause fix - migrate all logging update to use 1 function - for centralized kwarg updates by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23659 * fix: make db migration failure exit opt-in via --enforce_prisma_migration_check by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23675 * [Infra] Optimize CI Pipeline by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23721 * Fix: Vertex ai Batch Output File Download Fails with 500 by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23718 * docs(blog): add WebRTC blog post link by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23547 * Refactor: Filtering beta header after transformation by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23715 * fix(streaming): preserve custom attributes on final stream chunk by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23530 * [Feat] Add create character endpoints and other new videos Endpoints by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23737 * Litellm oss staging 03 14 2026 by @RheagalFire in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23686 * fix: align DefaultInternalUserParams Pydantic default with runtime fallback by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23666 * [Test] UI Dashboard - Add unit tests for 5 untested files by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23773 * [Infra] Merging RC Branch with Main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23786 * [Fix] Privilege Escalation on /key/block, /key/unblock, and /key/update max_budget by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23781 * chore(ui): migrate DefaultUserSettings buttons from Tremor to antd by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23787 * fix: set oauth2_flow when building MCPServer in _execute_with_mcp_client by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23468 * [Fix] UI - Logs: Empty Filter Results Show Stale Data by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23792 * Litellm update blog posts rss by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23791 * [Fix] Prevent Internal Users from Creating Invalid Keys by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23795 * [Fix] Key Alias Re-validation on Update Blocks Legacy Aliases by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23798 * fix: Register DynamoAI guardrail initializer and enum entry by @Harshit28j in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23752 * docs: add v1.82.3 release notes by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23816 * Revert "docs: add v1.82.3 release notes" by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23817 * [Feature] Disable Custom Virtual Key Values via UI Setting by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23812 * fix(ui): CSV export empty on Global Usage page by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23819 * fix: langfuse trace leak key on model params by @Harshit28j in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22188 * [Infra] Merge personal dev branch with daily dev branch by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23826 * Revert "fix: langfuse trace leak key on model params" by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23868 * [Infra] Merge daily dev branch with main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23827 * Litellm ryan march 16 by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23822 * [Fix] Add contents:write permission to ghcr_deploy release job by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23917 * [Infra] bump: version 1.82.3 → 1.82.4 by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23919 * docs(mcp_zero_trust): add MCP zero trust auth guide by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23918 * Capture incomplete terminal error in background streaming by @xianzongxie-stripe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23881 * fix: cache_control directive dropped anthropic document/file blocks by @kelvin-tran in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23911 * [Infra] Security and Proxy Extras for Nightly by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23921 ## New Contributors * @codspeed-hq[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23676 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/compare/v1.82.0.patch5...v1.82.4-nightly

item.title: v1.82.0.patch5
item.description: ## What's Changed * [Fix] Auth Error Message Typos by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23433 * [Test] MCP tools component unit tests by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23489 * [Feature] User Info V2 Endpoint by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23437 * [Fix] Public Model Hub Not Showing Config-Defined Models by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23501 * bump: version 1.82.1 → 1.82.2 by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23496 * chore: regenerate poetry.lock to match pyproject.toml by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23514 * [Docs] UI - Guide on how to set logo by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23556 * fix(proxy): prevent OOM/Prisma connection loss from unbounded managed-object poll by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23472 * [Infra] Merge Release Day Branch with Main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23584 * [Feature] Allow Setting organization_id on Key Update by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23557 * [Fix] Update Outdated test_responses_background_cost Assertions by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23589 * [Refactor] Extract validation from update_key_fn to fix PLR0915 lint by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23590 * [Infra] Merge internal dev branch to main by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23591 * added doc by @shivamrawat1 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23592 * fix: forward extra_headers to HuggingFace embedding API by @Jah-yee in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23525 * fix: fallback popup model dropdown z-index issue by @gambletan in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23516 * PR #22867 added _remove_scope_from_cache_control for Bedrock and Azur… by @awais786 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23183 * fix: auto-fill reasoning_content for moonshot kimi reasoning models by @pradyyadav in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23580 * Handle response.failed, response.incomplete, and response.cancelled by @xianzongxie-stripe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23492 * fix(security): bump tar to 7.5.11 and tornado to 6.5.5 by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23602 * Fix _supports_reasoning_effort_level for responses bridge by @Sameerlite in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23533 * fix(anthropic): preserve native tool format when guardrails convert tools for item.title: v1.82.2-silent.dev
item.description: ## What's Changed * [Issue#21344]: avoid migration hook serviceaccount dependency cycle by @devarakondasrikanth in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/21405 * Bug Fix: auto-inject prompt caching support for Gemini models by @RheagalFire in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/21881 * fix: set budget_reset_at when creating customer with budget_duration by @araman-godaddy in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22009 * fix(gemini): support detail parameter for image resolution on Gemini 2.x models by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/17662 * fix(streaming): map reasoning to reasoning_content in Delta for gpt-oss providers by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22803 * feat(mistral): add Voxtral audio transcription support by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22801 * Fix model management page UI improvements by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/19518 * Fix: User specified async client ignored with Gemini streaming+async by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/17550 * feat(openai): add litellm.acount_tokens() public API + OpenAI token counting support by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22809 * feat(black_forest_labs): add image generation and image edit support by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/18144 * docs: add DB query performance guidelines to CLAUDE.md by @CAFxX in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23196 * fix: add missing indexes for top CPU-consuming queries by @CAFxX in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23147 * fix: claude code req traces on langfuse by @Harshit28j in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23259 * fix: presidio edge case with antropic handle on pii token leak by @Harshit28j in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22627 * fix(streaming): map unknown finish_reason values to finish_reason_unspecified to prevent ValidationError in stream_chunk_builder by @xykong in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22673 * fix(security): strip secret_fields from guardrail logging response by @milan-berri in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23162 * feat(mcp): add token authentication support for MCP servers by @milan-berri in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23260 * Migrate user management buttons from Tremor to Ant Design by @ryan-crabbe in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23215 * fix: anthropic prompt caching returns a string instead of an int by @mubashir1osmani in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23229 * fix: tag usage cost panel zero by @mubashir1osmani in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23202 * fix(mcp): don't auto-detect M2M OAuth from field presence by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23187 * fix(mcp): add AWS SigV4 auth for Bedrock AgentCore MCP servers by @michelligabriele in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22782 * feat(panw-prisma-airs): PANW Prisma AIRS guardrail with apply_guardrail support by @jroberts2600 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22999 * fix(snowflake): transform tool_choice string to object format by @stevejaker in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23268 * policy builder by @shivamrawat1 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23287 * docs: pip venv upgrade workflow by @milan-berri in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23290 * docs(openai): document gpt-5.4 reasoning_effort + tools limitation by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23271 * feat(mcp): BYOM — non-admin MCP server submission + admin review workflow by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23205 * feat(ui): OpenAPI MCP server support with popular API quick-picker by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23200 * feat(openai): add missing supports_web_search to OpenAI models by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23275 * fix(vertex): skip schema transforms for Gemini 2.0+ tool parameters by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23265 * feat(images): support input_fidelity parameter for image edit API by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23201 * fix: preserve thinking block order with multiple web searches by @MaxwellCalkin in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23093 * feat: add model_cost aliases expansion support by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/21601 * feat(chat-ui): add MCP OAuth2 value prop and server auth badges by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23291 * feat(ui): show MCP tools per server in chat panel by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23294 * docs(responses): add tool_search & namespaces docs for gpt-5.4 by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23258 * fix(completion): unify finish_reason mapping to OpenAI-compatible values by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/22138 * Revert "policy builder" by @shivamrawat1 in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23295 * fix(mcp): fix OpenAPI OAuth flow — transport mapping, error messages, discovery bypass by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23300 * [Fix] UI - MCP Servers: stop health checks triggering on server deletion by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23063 * [Feature] UI - Keys: Improve VirtualKeysTable Column Display by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23301 * Team bring-your-own guardrails by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23307 * Revert "feat: add model_cost aliases expansion support" by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23313 * feat(chat-ui): responses API + MCP tool execution in /chat by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23297 * feat: add model_cost aliases expansion support by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23314 * feat(model): add qwen3.5 series for openrouter by @FacerAin in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23135 * feat(openai_like): add Responses API support to JSON providers by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/21398 * [Feat] UI - Show logos on MCP Apps page by @ishaan-jaff in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23320 * fix(codeql): remove ruby from language matrix by @joereyna in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23227 * [Feature] MCP Server Team-Scoped Filtering for Key Creation by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23323 * [Fix] MCP Key Scope Type Fix by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23326 * fix(anthropic): deduplicate tool_result messages by tool_call_id by @netbrah in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23104 * fix(anthropic): enforce type:"object" on tool input schemas in _map_tool_helper by @netbrah in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23103 * [Feature] UI - MCP Servers: Per-server health recheck by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23328 * [Test] UI - Logs: Add unit tests for view_logs components by @yuneng-jiang in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23298 * build(deps): bump hono from 4.10.6 to 4.12.7 in /litellm-js/spend-logs by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23312 * Litellm oss staging 03 04 2026 by @krrishdholakia in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23163 * Litellm oss staging 03 10 2026 by @RheagalFire in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/23276 * Fix (xai): streaming empty chunk bug for providers using BaseLLMHTTPHandler by @Chesars in https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/17155 *
